news.paragraph: Datadog is experiencing significant momentum following its first billion-dollar quarter and a raised revenue outlook for 2026 driven by AI adoption. While the stock has surged nearly 38%, traders should weigh this against a maintained sell rating from Goldman Sachs and broader market concerns about an overheating AI rally.
headlines: DDOG Q1 Deep Dive: AI Adoption and Product Expansion Drive Strong Growth
